import React, { useState } from 'react'; interface AuthModalProps { isOpen: boolean; onClose: () => void; } export const AuthModal: React.FC = ({ isOpen, onClose }) => { const [isLogin, setIsLogin] = useState(true); if (!isOpen) return null; return (
{/* Close button */} {/* Header Tabs */}

{isLogin ? 'Welcome Back' : 'Create an Account'}

{isLogin ? 'Enter your details to access your dashboard.' : 'Join LogiFlow to optimize your supply chain.'}

{ e.preventDefault(); onClose(); }}> {!isLogin && (
)}
{isLogin && Forgot?}
); };
